language_selection.description: Please choose your preferred language for the website

event_list_component.use_modern_browser: Please use a modern browser like Chrome, Firefox, or Edge for the best experience.
event_list_component.no_ongoing_events: There are no ongoing events, stay tuned for our next events!

table_list.event_being_created: Event is still being created. Please check back later!
table_list.welcome_adventurer: Welcome, brave adventurer, to the realm of tabletop quests and epic tales!
table_list.want_to_host: Want to host your own table?
table_list.share_favorite_game: Share your favorite game with fellow friends!

homepage.hero_subtitle: Crafting Worlds, Rolling Dice, Building Legends
homepage.about_text_1: We're not just your average RPG club - we're a community of gamers who love all sorts of adventures!
homepage.about_text_2: From epic D&D campaigns to exciting board game nights, we know how to have a fun while rolling dice and telling stories. Whether you're an experienced player or just curious about tabletop gaming, our doors are always open for new friends who want to join in on the fun since 2023.
homepage.roll_dice_description: Pick a scenario, choose your moves, and roll the d20 to see how your short escape story ends.
homepage.gm_dungeon_master: Dungeon Master | Activity Manager | Software Developer
homepage.emucon_memories_text: Thank you to everyone who made EMUCON 2025 unforgettable! Organized by EMURPG Club (Fantasy Fiction Club).

registration.subtitle: Register for this event!
registration.name: Name/Surname*
registration.not_registered: I am not registered to any of these clubs
registration.accept_terms: You must accept the event rules and privacy policy.
registration.select_club: Please select at least one club or indicate you are not registered.

charroller.hero_description: The ultimate companion for tabletop roleplayers. Create characters, roll dice, and keep your heroes ready for any quest.
charroller.cta_music_hint: Step inside to wake the tavern ambience.
charroller.cta_music_ready: The tavern ambience is ready. Enter when you are.
charroller.info_description: Charroller makes tabletop gaming easier, faster, and more fun. No more flipping through pages or doing math mid-session.
charroller.feature_ai_desc: Just describe your character idea and watch it come to life.
charroller.feature_dice_desc: Click any skill or attack to roll with proper modifiers.
charroller.feature_systems_desc: D&D 5e, Pathfinder, Call of Cthulhu, Fate - play whatever you love.
charroller.feature_pdf_desc: Already have a character sheet? Upload it and we'll extract all your rolls.
charroller.feature_save_desc: Build a collection of characters saved right in your browser.
charroller.feature_fast_desc: From zero to rolling in under a minute.
charroller.step1_desc: Describe your character in plain English, or upload an existing character sheet PDF.
charroller.step2_desc: AI extracts all your skills, attacks, and saves into clickable buttons.
charroller.step3_desc: Click to roll with proper modifiers. Focus on the story, not the math.
charroller.testimonial: Finally, a tool that gets out of the way and lets us focus on the adventure.
charroller.cta_ready: Ready to level up your tabletop experience?
charroller.no_characters_desc: The tavern is empty! Upload a character sheet or describe your hero to begin your adventure.
